feed.title: _w0bi
feed.subtitle: We talk about politics, tech, and the intersection of politics and tech.

entry.title: My Core Beliefs
entry.content:
1. Human ability is limited more by environment than by genetics.
  2. Liberalism is not perfect, but it’s the best political philosophy to maximize individual human rights, prosperity, and democracy at the same time.
  3. Software has barely begun eating the world.
entry.summary: Human ability is limited more by environment than by genetics. Liberalism is not perfect, but it’s the best political philosophy to maximize individual human rights, prosperity, and democracy at the same time. Software has barely begun eating the world.
